'''鈭歫-r-zh-zh''' ('''kajarzhezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exercise|exercise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exercise|exercise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-r-zh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kajarzhezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijarzhezhoko|thijarzhezhoko]] || [[word:jijarzhezhoko|jijarzhezhoko]] || [[word:shijarzhezhoko|shijarzhezhoko]] || [[word:kijarzhezhoko|kijarzhezhoko]]
